NTC OF HRG ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; INDEX FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $763.49 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE FEB-08-2013, FILED BY PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD WITH $550.00 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND $510 IN COSTS. SEE WRITTEN ORDER SIGNED AFTER CONCLUSION OF HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GUARDINO-CRAWFORD CO. $33,611.20 PRINCIPAL, $550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $510.00 COSTS, $300.00 COSTS OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,971.20, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND's hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed Order Confirming Arbitration Award with $550.00 in reasonable attorneys fees and $510 in costs. see written order signed after conclusion of hearing. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
